profile.name: Aritra Dhank
profile.bio: Full stack developer specializing in MERN stack with experience building scalable web applications, real-time systems, and role-based platforms. Strong foundation in DSA, system design fundamentals, and clean UI development.

experience.description: Working on scalable SaaS features, contributing to backend APIs and frontend components. Focus on performance, clean architecture, and production-level code practices.
Developed responsive frontend interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS. Collaborated on real-world client requirements and improved UI performance and usability.

projects.title: Real-time Chat App
projects.description: Built a real-time chat application with rooms, messaging, and scalable architecture using Socket.IO and MERN stack.

projects.title: Attendance Tracker App
projects.description: Full-stack attendance management system with authentication, role-based access, and CRUD operations.

projects.title: Book Store App
projects.description: Role-based e-commerce platform with payment integration, image uploads, and admin dashboard.
